rationale: The pre-fetched privacy policy states location data is never collected, while the code imports CoreLocation and starts continuous location updates — the direct contradiction named in procedure step 3.

fetched_urls.privacy_policy:
RunTracker Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

What we collect: your workout history is stored on your device and, if you enable sync, in your private iCloud container.

Location: We do not collect, process, or store your location data. RunTracker works entirely without knowing where you are.

Third parties: we do not share any data with third parties.

Contact: privacy@runtracker.example

notes: First case exercising the fetched_urls path; the policy text substitutes Pierre's live WebFetch of the privacy URL.
